consensus_summary: Propass Whey Protein Powder by Staples is a budget-friendly bulk protein option with mixed reception. Users appreciate the value and convenience of the carton format, but commonly report concerns about taste, mixability, and ingredient quality relative to specialized protein brands. Best suited for budget-conscious consumers prioritizing quantity over premium quality.
pros: No artificial sweeteners in some formulations
cons: Lower quality whey concentrate vs. isolate
Packaging can be awkward to open
red_flags: Consistent complaints about taste quality and palatability
Clumping and mixability issues affecting usability
Generic formulation without added micronutrients or enzymes
